static_proof.notes: Governance-only lane. No code changes. No runtime verification required. Document completeness verified by operator.

sections: 13. Contracts That Depend on This Standard

key_findings.provenance_jsonb_model_key: unknown — Codex must verify at implementation time

summary.root_cause: UTV2-848 is a governance lane. The provenance contract defines what provenance must mean, which fields are required, what PASS/WARN/FAIL/UNKNOWN mean, and how historical rows must be classified without fabrication. The primary gap identified is that model_or_heuristic_id does not exist anywhere in the current schema — there is no FK or JSONB reference linking pick_candidates to model_registry.
summary.resolution: Canonical provenance contract written at docs/06_status/provenance_contract_standard.md. All 13 required sections complete. Codex implementation packet included. No runtime changes made. No fabrication. No schema modifications.
